summary: Stop duplicating the OAuth access token into Config.SurgegraphToken on login, and stop AuthHeader() overwriting Config.AuthSource on read.
reason: Two related defects: (a) auth login wrote the access token to both AccessToken and SurgegraphToken; AuthHeader prefers SurgegraphToken, so a future refresh that updates only AccessToken would have left the stale SurgegraphToken winning. (b) AuthHeader unconditionally relabeled AuthSource as 'env:SURGEGRAPH_TOKEN' whenever SurgegraphToken was non-empty, regardless of whether it came from the env var or a config-file value, breaking doctor's auth-source report.
